task: Tier3 backlog terminal state and throughput recurrence prevention

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires requirement-to-evidence mapping, real Mac Mini verification, completion evidence, and scoped origin/main deployment.
Production changes require commit, push, deploy_to_macmini, runtime verification, and honest residual-risk reporting.

verification.name: Mac Mini production backlog diagnosis
verification.command: ssh macmini with read-only DB counts, launchctl state, and Tier3 log inspection
verification.result: Observed EDU backlog 834, hourly free worker returning no candidates, paid worker disabled, and retry-dlq LaunchAgent exit 1.

verification.name: frontend production bundle build
verification.result: passed: TypeScript and Vite production build

verification.name: Python entrypoint syntax check
verification.result: passed; also exposed and fixed pre-existing retry_dlq SyntaxError

verification.name: Mac Mini production API and backlog drain
verification.command: deploy, apply DLQ index migration, run terminal triage drain, then GET /api/pipeline/backlog?domain=edu_consulting
verification.result: passed: refined_total 70277, refine_backlog 0, retry_backlog 0, failed_terminal 0, refined_per_hour 834

verification.name: Mac Mini retry LaunchAgent recovery
verification.command: launchctl kickstart gui/UID/com.harness.retry-dlq then inspect exit code and DLQ retry timestamps
verification.result: passed: last exit code 0, 20 entries received retry_count and last_retry_at updates

verification.name: Mac Mini production frontend bundle
verification.command: curl production root and inspect served asset after deploy_to_macmini frontend rebuild

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with exact changed runtime paths after origin/main push
deploy.result: deployed successfully; frontend atomic build, backend reload, seven target paths matched origin/main, migration applied

review.copilot: Initial red_team_block findings addressed: retry ownership documented and syntax-fixed, DLQ state index added, SQL guards strengthened, rolling response compatibility added.
review.claude: Unavailable: Claude Code session limit reached; no clear verdict claimed.

residual_risk: In-app browser was unavailable, so visible card layout was not screenshot-verified; production API shape, served bundle, and HTML asset reference were verified.
